summary: Auto-apply discounts bug fix testing completed successfully. The fix to fetch discounts when items are added to cart (instead of only when checkout opens) is working correctly. Backend API tests (14/14 passed) and frontend UI verification confirms the feature is operational.

features_tested.feature: Auto-apply discounts fetched when items added to cart
details: useEffect in POSPage.js correctly triggers fetchAutoApplyDiscounts() when cart changes
300ms debounce prevents excessive API calls during rapid cart changes
Discounts reset to 0 when cart is empty
Auto Discounts section shows with total discount amount in green
Shows immediately when item is added (after debounce)
Bill Summary section shows 'Auto Discounts' with icon
Discount amounts shown in green with negative sign
Returns item_discounts, bogo_discounts, tiered_discount, total_discount, final_total
Correctly filters by store_id and apply_on channel
auto_apply flag respected - skips discounts with auto_apply=False
'Spend More Save More' tiers: ₹2000=₹100 off, ₹5000=₹300 off, ₹10000=10% off
'Buy 2 Get 1 Free' and 'Test BOGO' offers are configured
API correctly calculates free_quantity and discount_amount
Auto-applies when quantity meets buy_quantity threshold

critical_code_review_comments: GOOD: useEffect dependency array [cart, selectedStore, subtotal, isOnline] ensures discounts recalculate when relevant data changes
GOOD: 300ms debounce prevents API spam during rapid quantity changes
GOOD: Discounts reset to initial state when cart is empty
GOOD: Backend correctly filters discounts by auto_apply, store_id, and apply_on channel
GOOD: Frontend displays breakdown with discount names (Test Tiered, BOGO offer names)
seed_data_creation: Used existing test discounts in database
context_for_next_testing_agent: Auto-apply discount feature is fully working. The bug fix changed the useEffect to trigger on cart changes instead of showCheckout. Key code is in POSPage.js lines 589-607. Backend endpoint /api/discounts/calculate-all handles all discount types (item, BOGO, tiered) with centralized filtering.

verification_summary.original_bug: Discounts not fetching automatically when items added to cart
verification_summary.fix_applied: Changed useEffect dependency from [showCheckout] to [cart, selectedStore, subtotal, isOnline]
verification_summary.verification_result: CONFIRMED WORKING - Discounts fetch immediately when items added to cart
